Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Iron body]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Kelsa is close to condensing her Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin possesses the speed of an Iron body.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — Iron body is a trait or effect that comes with the Iron stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — An Iron body is a physical attribute or stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — Those with Iron bodies tend to forget the fragility of those without.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — The Iron body allows for rapid healing of injuries into scars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Serious sacred artists train their bodies before advancing to Iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon has an Iron body.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — An Iron body provides robustness against heat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon has an Iron body that can heal his eyes using madra.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — A Highgold girl has an Iron body.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — The Iron body is suited for fighting off venom and disease.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Pride's Iron body makes it almost impossible for him to bleed to death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin's madra goes to her Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon relies on his Iron body for healing.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Kelsa reversed her Iron body.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Jaran has an Iron body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — A man on the third floor of a tower has an Iron body.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon's Iron body did not handle the wounds he received during his technique.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
